request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about Lesson Summary & Homework. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Recap and Bridge to Next Session. Must show visually: - Life processes sustain living organisms.; - Nutrition: Autotrophs vs Heterotrophs.; - Respiration releases energy from glucose.. Visual goal: Clean summary slide with a checkmark icon list. Homework section highlighted in an accent color box at the bottom.. Teaching context: Summarize key takeaways and assign homework.. Student takeaway: Students know what they learned and what to do next.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout. Do not include any words, letters, labels, headings, captions, bullets, equat...
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
